title: Unidentified orbital security station
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{SpaceStation |image=[[File:RonikaOrbitalstation.jpg]] |name=Unidentified orbital security station |designer= |manufacturer= |line= |model= |type=[[Space station/Legends|Space station]][[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 2]] |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length= |width= |height= |diameter= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament= |complement=At least 2 [[Koros starfighter|starfighters]] |bays= |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |region=[[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]]{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20050414planet2|series=Byss and the Deep Core|text=Part 2: Empress Teta}} |sector=[[Koros sector/Legends|Koros sector]]''[[Nexus of Power]]'' — Based on corresponding data for [[Empress Teta system/Legends|Koros system]] |system=[[Empress Teta system/Legends|Koros system]] |coordinates=L-10''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' — Based on corresponding data for [[Empress Teta system/Legends|Koros system]] |xyz= |orbited=[[Ronika/Legends|Ronika]] |distance= |routes=*[[Byss Run/Legends|Byss Run]] *[[Daragon Trail]] *[[Koros Trunk Line/Legends|Koros Trunk Line]] |role=[[Orbital security station/Legends|Orbital security station]] |affiliation=[[Tetan monarchy/Legends|Tetan Monarchy]] |constructed= |destroyed= |retired= |battles= |owners= |namedcrew= |captains= |registry= |aliases= |population= |interest= |services= |sectors= |modules= }} {{Quote|No, this isn't a drill, you idiot! One of the workers stole an ore shuttle and is heading toward orbit!…Intercept her!|A guard on Ronika, communicating with the orbital security station|}} An '''orbital security station''' [[Orbit/Legends|circled]] [[Ronika/Legends|Ronika]], a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core's]] [[Empress Teta system/Legends|Koros system]]. In [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]], the [[Orbital security station/Legends|orbital station]] maintained security in [[Realspace/Legends|space]] above Ronika, which was at that [[Time/Legends|time]] used by the [[Tetan monarchy/Legends|monarchy]] of the planet [[Empress Teta/Legends|Koros Major]] as a [[Prison/Legends|prison]] world. That year, the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jori Daragon]], who was imprisoned on Ronika, stole a [[drone ore shuttle]] on the planet's surface and attempted to escape the harsh world and return to her [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of Koros Major. [[Unidentified guard (Ronika)|A guard]] on Ronika's surface notified the security station of the escape attempt and ordered it to intercept Daragon. The security station launched two [[Koros starfighter|starfighters]] to pursue Daragon; however, she was able to escape. ==Description== An [[Orbital security station/Legends|orbital security station]] [[Orbit/Legends|circled]] [[Ronika/Legends|Ronika]], the eighth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Empress Teta system/Legends|Koros system]] that was located within the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core's]] [[Koros sector/Legends|Koros sector]]. Along with the rest of the [[Star system/Legends|system]], the [[Space station/Legends|space station]] was situated at the junction of the [[Byss Run/Legends|Byss Run]] and [[Koros Trunk Line/Legends|Koros Trunk Line]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace routes]], which linked it to the [[Keeara Major system/Legends|Keeara Major]] and [[Jerrilek system/Legends|Jerrilek system]], respectively. The Koros system also constituted an endpoint of the [[Daragon Trail]] route, which connected it directly to the [[Horuset system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. The station was a [[Color/Legends|gray]]-colored three-part structure, with the two outer parts being connected to the central part. All three of the station's components boasted numerous antennae. The security station had a complement of at least two [[Koros starfighter|starfighters]] that were used to pursue [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]] attempting to escape Ronika. ==History== {{Quote|Does she really think she can get away?"''
''"These prisoners get dumber every day.|The pilots of the space station's starfighters|}} In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]],According to the [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comics]], [[Jori Daragon]]'s flight from [[Ronika/Legends|Ronika]] occurred shortly before the beginning of the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]], which is dated by ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' to the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]]. the orbital station maintained security in [[Realspace/Legends|space]] above Ronika, which was at that [[Time/Legends|time]] used by the [[Empress Teta/Legends|Koros Major]] [[Tetan monarchy/Legends|monarchy]] as a forced-labor [[Prison/Legends|prison]] world. That year, the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jori Daragon]], who was imprisoned on Ronika, stole a [[drone ore shuttle]] on the planet's surface and attempted to escape the harsh world and return to Koros Major, her [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. However, a [[Unidentified guard (Ronika)|guard]] on Ronika's surface notified the security station of the escape attempt and ordered it to intercept Daragon. The security station launched two [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] by two individuals who felt certain that no prisoner could escape Ronika, to pursue Daragon; however, due to the fighters' [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] being ineffective against the [[Ore/Legends|ore]] [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle's]] heavy [[Deflector shield/Legends|shielding]], Daragon was able to escape to Koros Major. ==Behind the scenes== To date, the orbital security station has only appeared in the [[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 2|second]] issue of [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire|''The Fall of the Sith Empire'']] story arc of the [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'']] series of [[Star Wars comic books|comic books]]. The issue was published on [[July 23]], [[1997]],{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54583/star_wars_tales_of_the_jedi_-_the_fall_of_the_sith_empire_1997_2|text=Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi - The Fall of the Sith Empire (1997) #2}} written by [[Kevin J. Anderson]], and penciled by [[Dario Carrasco, Jr.]] The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Koros system, and therefore the station, in grid square L-10. ==Appearances== *[[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 2]] {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Empress Teta system locations]] [[Category:Orbital security stations]] [[Category:Space stations in the Deep Core]]
